text: Drone Registration Packages in Thailand | CAAT & NBTC Compliance top of page Search CONTACT Choose the Package That Fits Your Journey Fly in Thailand without delays, errors, or unnecessary paperwork. Our package services eliminate every administrative burden—including drone insurance, CAAT licensing, UAV registration, and NBTC controller licensing—so you avoid time-consuming forms, unclear requirements, and approval risks. You pay for convenience, accuracy, and guaranteed legal compliance, ensuring your limited travel time is protected. Choose the level of support that matches how you want to fly Both packages give you the same final legal outcome: full compliance to fly in Thailand. The difference is the level of support you prefer. ​ Package 1 is a full-service option where we handle every step for you. ​ Package 2 is a self-paced option where you complete the CAAT theory exam on your own while we guide you through all remaining legal requirements. pkg-full-service ​ Fly legally in Thailand. Without stress, delays, or wasted holiday time This is our most popular option for visitors who want everything handled professionally, correctly, and on time — while they focus on enjoying their trip. ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ What we handle for you CAAT drone pilot licensing (if required) UAV registration with CAAT NBTC radio controller registration CAAT-compliant drone insurance All forms prepared, reviewed, and submitted correctly Follow-up, corrections, and authority coordination until approval Every step is managed by our team to meet current CAAT and NBTC requirements — no trial-and-error, no guesswork. ​ ​ ​ What you do Send us your documents Sign where required ​ ​ Why most travelers choose Full Service Save time — no learning Thai government systems Avoid rejection and delays — common with self-submission Reduce risk — incorrect filings can invalidate flights or insurance Peace of mind — everything is checked line-by-line More holiday time — we handle the paperwork, not you ​ ​ What you gain Fast, low-stress approval process Highest level of support Clear legal status to fly in Thailand Confidence during inspections or checks This service is ideal if you are: Visiting Thailand for a limited time Flying for photography, travel, or commercial work Not familiar with Thai aviation and telecom regulations Unwilling to risk delays, rejection, or legal issues ​ ​ ​ ​ You’re not paying more for paperwork. You’re paying to protect your time, your trip, and your ability to fly legally — the first time. Package 1: Full Service All-inclusive full compliance — 4,500 THB Start Full Service Registration Both packages lead to legal drone approval in Thailand; the difference is how much assistance you want. pkg-self-paced Package 2: Self-Paced Best for pilots who are comfortable handling part of the process themselves and want expert oversight to avoid mistakes. This option is designed for experienced or budget-conscious pilots who prefer to complete certain steps independently, while still ensuring full legal compliance under Thai regulations. What TDS provides CAAT-compliant drone insurance Clear step-by-step guidance for CAAT, UAV, and NBTC processes Document review before submission Expert clarification if issues or questions arise All guidance is aligned with current CAAT and NBTC requirements to reduce the risk of rejection. What you handle Completing the CAAT theory exam (if required) Uploading forms and paying official portal fees Tracking your application status through government systems What you gain Lower total cost compared to full service Full legal compliance to fly in Thailand Professional support when needed, without full-service pricing Greater control over your own application timeline Important note This option requires your time and attention. Not recommended if you prefer a fully managed, hands-off process. Guided compliance support — 2,250 THB Start Guided Registration Additional Options Insurance-only and NBTC-only services are available on their respective pages for customers who do not require full registration support. How Long It Takes to Become Legally Approved Most registrations are completed within 1–3 business days, depending on document readiness and authority processing schedules. Typical Timeline Step 1 — Document Submission & Review Same day (1–2 hours) After payment, you submit the required documents. Our team checks completeness and compliance before proceeding. Step 2 — Insurance Activation 1–2 business days Your CAAT-approved drone insurance policy is issued and activated. You receive a valid e-policy for legal use in Thailand. Step 3 — CAAT & NBTC Processing 1–2 business days CAAT and NBTC registrations are processed. Any minor corrections (if required) are handled by our team to avoid rejection. ​ ​ Important Timing Notes To avoid delays, we recommend not submitting documents on Thursday or Friday, as NBTC processing may continue into the following week. Please check Thailand public holidays, as nationwide holidays may affect insurance issuance and NBTC processing timelines. All timelines are based on Thai business hours (Bangkok GMT+7) and authority queue conditions. Start Your Legal Drone Registration Submit your details and our team will guide you through the CAAT, NBTC, and insurance process for your trip to Thailand. Not sure which package fits you?
